domain: Constitutional legal systems under judicial review
state_space: Corpus of binding legal doctrine and constitutional precedent
dynamics_operator: Legislative enactment, executive action, judicial interpretation
perturbation_operator: Unconstitutional legislation, novel jurisprudential challenges, societal value shifts
stability_condition: Judicial invalidation of unconstitutional acts maintains doctrinal coherence
failure_mode: Constitutional crisis, judicial capture, or systemic abrogation of binding precedent
timescale_regime: Years to decades (judicial terms and legal generations)
notes: Stability requires continuous interpretative maintenance against legislative drift.
